trim.name: 音訊裁剪
trim.description: 將音訊檔案裁剪到所需長度。
trim.metaTitle: 音訊裁剪 - 線上免費剪輯音訊
trim.metaDescription: 將音訊裁剪到任意長度。精確設定起始和結束點。免費線上工具。
trim.keywords: 音訊裁剪, 音訊剪輯, mp3 裁剪
trim.unsupported: 此工具需要 SharedArrayBuffer 支援。請使用支援 HTTPS 的新版瀏覽器。

faq.a1: 支援 MP3、WAV、OGG、AAC、FLAC、M4A 等大多數格式。
faq.a2: 是的，使用串流複製模式不重新編碼即保留原始品質。
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

convert.name: 音訊轉換器
convert.description: 在 MP3、WAV、OGG、AAC、FLAC 之間轉換音訊檔案。
convert.metaTitle: 音訊轉換器 - 線上免費轉換音訊
convert.metaDescription: 在 MP3、WAV、OGG、AAC、FLAC 之間轉換音訊。免費線上工具。
convert.keywords: 音訊轉換器, mp3 轉換, wav 轉 mp3
convert.unsupported: 此工具需要 SharedArrayBuffer 支援。請使用支援 HTTPS 的新版瀏覽器。

faq.a1: 可在 MP3、WAV、OGG、AAC、FLAC 之間轉換。
faq.a2: 在瀏覽器中處理，非常大的檔案可能較慢。建議 100MB 以下。
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

extract.name: 音訊擷取
extract.description: 從影片檔案中擷取音訊軌。
extract.metaTitle: 從影片擷取音訊 - 免費線上音訊擷取工具
extract.metaDescription: 從影片中以 MP3、WAV、AAC 擷取音訊。免費線上工具。
extract.keywords: 音訊擷取, 影片轉音訊, 影片擷取 mp3
extract.unsupported: 此工具需要 SharedArrayBuffer 支援。請使用支援 HTTPS 的新版瀏覽器。

faq.q1: 可以從哪些影片格式擷取音訊？
faq.a1: 支援 MP4、WebM、MOV、AVI 等大多數影片格式。
faq.q2: 可以匯出為哪些音訊格式？
faq.a2: 可匯出為 MP3、WAV、AAC 格式。
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.
